Organizations must obtain explicit consent for the use of cookies on their websites.
Personal data must be processed lawfully, fairly, and transparently under GDPR.
Data controllers are required to implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to ensure data security.
Individuals have the right to access and control their personal data under GDPR.
Data encryption must be used to protect personal data from unauthorized access or breaches.
Companies must comply with GDPR regulations regarding the transfer of personal data outside of the European Union.
Data subjects have the right to request the deletion of their personal data under certain circumstances.
Explicit consent is required for the processing of sensitive personal data.
Data controllers must notify authorities of data breaches within 72 hours of becoming aware of the breach.
Data processors must only process personal data based on the controller's instructions and obligations.
